nameOption: The new name for your Tent
limitSubcommand: Set a limit on the number of users in your Tent
limitOption: The new user limit for your Tent (0 = No limit)
hostTargetOption: The user to transfer host to
levelSubcommand: Set a level requirement to see and join your Tent
levelOption: The new level requirement for your Tent
addSubcommand: Allow a user to join your Tent when locked or hidden
banSubcommand: Ban and disconnect a user from your Tent
notOwnerError: You can only use this command in a voice channel Tent that you own!
notModeratorVoiceError: You must be in a voice channel or use this command in a voice channel's text chat as a moderator.
notInVoiceError: You must be in a voice channel to use this command.
notInTentError: You can only use this command in a Tent.
notHostError: You must be the host or a moderator to use this command.
limitRemovedDesc: Your tent now has no user limit.
limitSetDesc: Your tent now has a user limit of {{limit}}.
limitRemovedChannelDesc: There is now no user limit.
limitSetChannelDesc: The tent now has a max user limit of {{limit}}.
levelRemovedDesc: Your tent now has no level requirement.
levelSetDesc: Only users level {{level}} or higher can join your tent.
levelRemovedChannelDesc: There is now no level requirement to join this tent.
levelSetChannelDesc: Only users level {{level}} or higher can join this tent.
lockedDesc:
Currently joined users have been automatically `/add`ed and will be able to rejoin if they disconnect.

    Note: Mods can still join locked tents, though only if deemed necessary.
unlockedDesc: Your tent is now open to everyone not `/tent ban`ned.
hostNotConnectedDesc:
The new host must be in the tent to be set as the host.
        Please pick a user that is currently in the tent.
hostChannelDesc:
{{user}} is now host.
    The host can use `/tent` commands.
userUnbannedAddedDesc: {{user}} has been unbanned and added to the tent.
userIsModAddDesc: Moderators are already able to join all tents.
userAddedDesc: {{user}} can now join, regardless of other settings.
userIsModBanDesc: You cannot ban a moderator! They can join all tents.
userBannedDesc: {{user}} has been banned from the tent. They can no longer view or join this channel.
cooldownUserDesc:
You already used this command <t:{{time}}:R>.
        You can use it again <t:{{nextTime}}:R>.
cooldownGlobalDesc:
This command is on cooldown.
        It can next be used <t:{{nextTime}}:R>.
loungeNotFoundError: The lounge channel could not be found. This should not have happened, please contact a developer.
vcRoleNotFoundError: The Join VC role could not be found. This should not have happened, please contact a developer.
pingSentDesc: The Join VC role has been pinged in <#{{channel}}>.
